Interface IAttachment

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members of an attachment.

[Guid("475E3D30-5478-46C2-9547-09AA7076DCE6")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IAttachment

Properties

AttachmentID

ID that uniquely identifies the attachment.

long AttachmentID { get; }

Property Value

long

Examples

Sample Snippet

ContentType

Content type that describes the attachment data.

string ContentType { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Data

Attachment data.

IMemoryBlobStream Data { get; set; }

Property Value

IMemoryBlobStream

Examples

Sample Snippet

GlobalID

Global ID that uniquely identifies the attachment.

string GlobalID { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name

Name of the attachment.

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ParentGlobalID

Parent global ID to which the attachment belongs.

string ParentGlobalID { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ParentID

Parent ID to which the attachment belongs.

long ParentID { get; }

Property Value

long

Examples

Sample Snippet

Size

Size of the attachment data in bytes.

int Size { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Value[esriAttachmentTableField]

Get the value of a member of the attachemnt by name.

object Value[esriAttachmentTableField key] { get; }

key esriAttachmentTableField

object
